description: Edge case: forget by filter only (no ids), scoped to one user_id and one type. Demonstrates the filter-only branch — the server resolves matching rows itself.
notes: When both ids and filter are absent the request MUST be rejected (defensive: avoid a no-scope mass-delete). The user_id is duplicated at the top level and inside filter so a backend that does not look at the filter object still scopes correctly. Soft delete by default.
